title: Diagonal Suite Bluemap Compat
description: Adds compat between BlueMap, Fuzs's Diagonal Mods, And Several Others!
body:
This pack adds compat between BlueMap and Fuzs's Diagonal Mods!
Diagonal Fences
Diagonal Windows
Diagonal Walls



<details>
<summary>It currently has compatibility with</summary>

Unless stated otherwise they only display non diagonal direction.

Vanilla Minecraft - Semi Functional Diagonal

[Chipped](https://modrinth.com/mod/chipped)

[Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)

[Create Deco](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-deco)

[Macaw's Fences and Walls](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-fences-and-walls)

[Macaw's Fences - Oh The Biomes You'll Go / Oh The Biomes We've Gone](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-fences-oh-the-biomes-youll-go)

[Oh The Biomes We've Gone](https://modrinth.com/mod/oh-the-biomes-weve-gone)
</details>


<details>
<summary>Installation Steps</summary>

To install a resource/data-pack you just need to put the pack-folder or zip into the folder packs next to your configuration files and reload BlueMap. BlueMap will scan the folder and try to load every resource it finds.

    **Sponge, Forge, Fabric:** ./config/bluemap/packs/

    **Spigot/Paper:** ./plugins/BlueMap/packs/ CLI: ./config/packs/

See the [wiki](https://bluemap.bluecolored.de/wiki/customization/ResourcePacks.html) for more information!
</details>




If you have suggestions for other mods to be added please leave a comment!

Also check out [Kreffox's](https://www.curseforge.com/members/kreffox/projects) [Diagonal Fences BlueMap Pack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/diagonal-fences-bluemap-pack) & [Diagonal Windows BlueMap Pack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/diagonal-windows-bluemap-pack)! Their pack adds several compats that mine does not, i made this specifically to add Wall, [Chipped](https://modrinth.com/mod/chipped), and [Oh The Biomes We've Gone](https://modrinth.com/mod/oh-the-biomes-weve-gone) support!

**I do not know how to fix the gaps, if anyone does and wants to share i will do my best to implement it!**
